C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\IdleHands.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\IdleHands.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\IdleHands.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG  -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\IdleHands.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o IdleHands.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libIdleHands.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\IdleHands.dir\linkLibs.rsp
